title: Ticket System Removal and Security Updates
summary: Complete removal of the ticket system alongside enhancements to security measures for improved protection.
removed: Entire ticket system, including all related features, commands, and integrations
security: Updated security protocols with enhanced measures, including improved encryption, access controls, and threat detection for better overall system integrity

title: Rebrand, new ownership, and policy release
summary: Project transition completed with new ownership, branding, and foundational policy releases.
added: Full rebrand following acquisition from original owner
New ownership structure and resumed active development
changed: Project identity, naming, and public-facing branding
Internal development roadmap and maintenance ownership
security: Formalised Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to clarify data handling, moderation scope, and usage expectations

title: Strive Review + Anti-Nuke security rollout
summary: New security systems to prevent nukes and require owner approval for bots with dangerous permissions.
added: Strive Review: bots with dangerous permissions are kicked first and sent to #strive-review for owner approval
Accept/Deny review panel with buttons, including owner ping, bot details, permission list, and adder/executor info
changed: Bot security now evaluates dangerous permissions on join and on permission-grant events
Improved audit-log correlation to attribute bot adds / role grants more reliably
fixed: Strive Review now triggers correctly for bots invited with dangerous permissions at join (not only after role updates)
security: Hardened bot onboarding against admin-permission abuse via OAuth invites and post-join role grants
Reduced blast radius from rapid destructive actions with strengthened anti-nuke lockdown behavior

title: Dashboard + Automod improvements
summary: Big stability pass across automod commands and the dashboard experience.
added: Search bar to filter patch notes instantly
changed: Unified automod setting keys to prevent mismatch issues
Improved command validation for toggles and thresholds
Cleaner dashboard routing for new pages
fixed: Max lines now correctly supports 0 = disabled
Mass mention threshold handling is consistent across slash + prefix commands
Reduced random crashes when settings fields are missing
security: Hardened session usage and safer fallbacks when user info fetch fails

title: Moderation & UI polish
summary: Quality-of-life improvements for staff and cleaner UI behavior.
added: Better active highlighting in the sidebar (nested routes supported)
Improved empty states and error handling on pages
changed: Sidebar now safely renders even if guild/user data is missing
Refined spacing and typography for dashboard pages
fixed: Minor layout issues on large screens
Occasional broken sidebar active state on /manage/* routes

title: Initial dashboard cleanup
summary: Stability and structure improvements to make future features easier.
added: More consistent view structure with shared includes
Better router separation for dashboard features
fixed: Unreliable navigation behavior in some routes
Multiple small rendering issues caused by missing locals
